subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter thou didst write to Jináb-i-Manshádí hath been received. That pure spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق نامه که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودی رسید چون آن روح پاک
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity in diversity, @praise and encouragement, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
